title: angular-admin-design mock-spec
description: Generated by /aad-mock from plan.endpoints + captured fixtures (or AI-synthesized fallback). Drives the MockXxxService body + fixture files on disk.

serviceClass.description: Concrete real service class name, e.g. 'AdHardblockAllotmentHistoryApiService'

interfaceName.description: Service interface name, e.g. 'IAdHardblockAllotmentHistoryApiService'. The plugin generates this interface so MockXxxService and XxxApiService can both implement it.

serviceMethod.description: Method name on the service, e.g. 'getHardblockHistory'

fixtureSource.description: captured: real response file on disk. prototype-captured (v0.7.1): copied from prototype network capture .spec/prototype-network/. synthetic: AI-generated from interface. synthetic-pending: declared but not yet generated.

fixtureFile.description: Path relative to projectRoot (e.g. 'mocks/ad-hardblock-allotment-history/get-history.json'). Always present except for synthetic-pending.

responseShape.description: Free-form: { wrapped: true, successFlagField: 'succeedYn', resultField: 'result', listField: 'list', totalField: 'totalCount' } so MockXxxService can wrap synthetic data in the right envelope.

warnings.description: Why the fixture was treated as synthetic (no captured file found, interface missing fields, etc.)
